info.title: dotnet config2json
info.description: A simple tool for migrating a web.config file to an appsettings.json file

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(Boolean), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String, Boolean), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String, Boolean))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Converts a web.config file to an appsettings.json file

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the file or directory to migrate

arguments.name: delimiter
arguments.description: The character in keys to replace with the section delimiter (:)

arguments.name: prefix
arguments.description: If provided, an additional namespace to prefix on generated keys
